full_text:
Li Su (Weigong) 李肅 (偉恭)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Su (李肅), styledWeigong (偉恭), was born in Nanyang. An excellent judge of talents, he would later be held in high honour by the people. Li Su was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Li Su lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
